rationale: Config-only addition reusing a fully-implemented, executor-wired, test-covered mechanism; Option B (deferred dispatch guard) requires net-new executor plumbing to expose terminated_by to captured with no existing read-side precedent.
rule: Option A — enable circuit.repeated_failure/StallDetector in refine-to-ready-issue.yaml
alternatives_rejected: Option B: dispatch-guard via deferred_by/deferred_reason discriminator on autodev.yaml recheck_set — write-side idiom is reusable but the guard/read side and terminated_by exposure are net-new; tracked as viable follow-on (see ENH-2686).
